descriptions: Chauns MC is a support club of Sin City Deciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the group's support clubs include the Street Misfitz MC, Black Angels MC, So Solid Ryders MC, Ridin’ Like We Stole It MC, and Chauns MC.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia Salentina aggregated former members of Famiglia Salentina Libera.
edges.evidence_quote: A seguito della "pace" stipulata da Pantaleo De Matteis (detto Pantaluccio) e dal cognato Salvatore Rizzo con la SCU di Rogoli, nel 1986 nacque nel carcere di Lecce la Nuova Famiglia Salentina, aggregando i vecchi associati della Famiglia Salentina Libera

descriptions: FSL changed its name to Nuova Famiglia Salentina.
edges.evidence_quote: la Famiglia Salentina Libera, guidata dal boss leccese Salvatore Rizzo e dal cognato Pantaleo De Matteis, che cambiò nome in Nuova Famiglia Salentina (NFL)

descriptions: FSL was formed in response to SCU, claiming independence.
edges.evidence_quote: In risposta alla formazione della SCU, nacque nel carcere di Pianosa la Famiglia Salentina Libera (F.S.L.)

edges.target: Popular Resistance of the Eastern Region
descriptions: Popular Resistance of the Eastern Region is listed as an opponent of SDF in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List of opponents Hezbollah , Iran , Islamic State , Liwa Fatemiyoun , Popular Mobilization Forces (sometimes) , Popular Resistance of the Eastern Region , Russia , Ba'athist Syria (sometimes, until 2024) , Syrian National Army (until 2025) , Turkey , Arab Tribal and Clan Forces

descriptions: Gambino family, as part of the Commission, supported the Gallo brothers in their conflict with the Profaci family.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1960s, the Commission backed the Gallo brothers in their rebellion against Profaci family boss Joe Profaci.

descriptions: Los Viagras is a sub-unit of the LNFM Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras ... is an armed wing of the LNFM Cartel

Sun Yee On.description: Sun Yee On is a major triad organization based in Hong Kong and China, founded in 1919 by Heung Chin. It has over 25,000 members worldwide and is active in multiple countries including the UK, US, France, and Belgium. The group is involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, money laundering, and other illegal activities. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: 14K and Sun Yee On are main rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: They are the main rival of the Sun Yee On

descriptions: Sun Yee On is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Both Wo On Lok and Sun Yee On fled to Britain around the same time due to the same event, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the signing of the Sino-British Joint Declaration between the UK and China in 1984, the news of Hong Kong's return to China caused many Triads to flee to Britain, specifically the Wo On Lok and the Sun Yee On .

descriptions: Sun Yee On is allied with Sinaloa Cartel for precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: Sun Yee On

descriptions: Snakeheads are rivals with Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sun Yee On , Wo Hop To

descriptions: Sun Yee On competes with 14K in the fictional setting of Black Lagoon.
edges.evidence_quote: In the anime adaptation of Black Lagoon, the Thai branch of Sun Yee On... competes with the other organised crime syndicates in the city like the 14K.

descriptions: Infobox lists Albanian mafia as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists American Mafia as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Camorra as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Serbian mafia as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo On Lok as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Sinaloa Cartel as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Wah Ching as a rival of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K, Wah Ching, Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo Hop To as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo members murdered a Sun Yee On boss, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Lee Tai-lung, a Sun Yee On boss in Tsim Sha Tsui, was murdered in front of the Kowloon Shangri-La hotel on 4 August 2009 by members of the Wo Shing Wo gang.

descriptions: Sun Yee On is a triad group within the Chiu Chow Group.
edges.evidence_quote: the Chiu Chow Group (including Sun Yee On), 14K, the Wo Group (including Wo Shing Wo), and the Sze Tai

descriptions: Sun Yee On is a triad based in Hong Kong, listed as a powerful triad.
edges.evidence_quote: The most powerful triads based in Hong Kong are: - Chiu Chow Group : Sun Yee On

descriptions: San Yee On is a Chinese gang connected to the Triad operating in South Africa.
edges.evidence_quote: South African authorities have identified four major Chinese gangs connected to the Triad operating in South Africa: the Wo Shing Wo group, the San Yee On group, the 14K-Hau group, and the 14K-Ngai group.

descriptions: Sun Yee On is a triad group; Lee Tai-lung is a dragon head of its Tsim Sha Tsui branch.
edges.evidence_quote: Lee Tai-lung (dragon head of Tsim Sha Tsui branch of Sun Yee On until his assassination on August 4, 2009).

descriptions: Sun Yee On is listed as an ally of Wah Ching in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sun Yee On

descriptions: Wo Hop To is affiliated with Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Hop To specialises in protection rackets and is affiliated with the Sun Yee On triad.

descriptions: Leung Kwok-chung of Wo Shing Wo masterminded the murder of Lee Tai-lung of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Leung Kwok-chung, aka "Tattooed Chung" (high-ranking leader of the Tai Kok Tsui branch of Wo Shing Wo and the mastermind behind the murder of Lee Tai-lung, the dragon head of Tsim Sha Tsui branch of Sun Yee On ).

descriptions: Sun Yee On is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K , Ah Kong , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok

descriptions: The 36 Boys and Autonomists had a short-lived alliance during May riots.
edges.evidence_quote: During the May riots in Kreuzberg, the 36 Boys initially joined the Autonomists, but the alliance was short-lived because of the group's lack of political orientation.

New Springville Boys.description: The New Springville Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or farm team for the American Mafia, specifically the Bonanno and Colombo crime families. Based in Staten Island, New York, the gang operated from the 1980s to the 2000s, engaging in burglary, robbery, loan sharking, money laundering, drug trafficking, and other crimes. Members were indicted for burglarizing over 30 night-deposit boxes and hijacking a truckload of marijuana.

descriptions: The New Springville Boys served as a recruitment gang for the American Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Springville Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or "farm team" for the American Mafia

descriptions: The New Springville Boys was a farm team specifically for the Bonanno crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: specifically the Bonanno crime family

descriptions: The New Springville Boys were allied with the Colombo crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family Colombo crime family

descriptions: Khanh's organization forced Hung Cuba's group to submit by blocking routes, then merged the two organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Khanh attempted to negotiate with Hung Cuba for control over these areas, but the two didn't come to an agreement. In response, Khanh had his men block all of the routes to the bus station and Long Bien market. Unable to transport or receive any of his goods from shippers, Hung Cuba was forced to submit to Khanh's will.

descriptions: Dirty Knuckles MC is a support club allied with Cossacks MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dirty Knuckles MC (support club)

'Ndrina Costanzo.description: The 'Ndrina Costanzo is a Mafia clan ('ndrina) of the 'Ndrangheta based in the area of Catanzaro, Italy. It is allied with the Arena clan of Isola di Capo Rizzuto. The clan is led by Girolamo Costanzo, who is currently imprisoned.

descriptions: Costanzo is listed as an ally of Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Costanzo

edges.target: Arena di Isola di Capo Rizzuto
descriptions: The 'Ndrina Costanzo is allied with the Arena clan.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Costanzo è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della zona di Catanzaro alleata con gli Arena di Isola di Capo Rizzuto .

descriptions: Al-Islah was accused of being in league with Al Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Former president Ali Abdullah Saleh made substantial efforts to entrench the accusations of being in league with Al Qaeda.

descriptions: Al-Islah is the political arm of the Muslim Brotherhood in Yemen.
edges.evidence_quote: The Muslim Brotherhood is the political arm of the Yemeni Congregation for Reform, commonly known as Al-Islah.

FFF (gang).description: FFF was a gang centered in the San Fernando Valley during the 1980s, notable for consisting primarily of white Americans from middle and upper middle class backgrounds. It was founded by members of a punk rock band of the same name. The gang's activities largely ended after prominent member Mark Miller was fatally shot in 1985.

descriptions: Three Brotherhood Alliance lists National Unity Government as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: State allies National Unity Government

descriptions: The División del Norte was formally subordinate to the Constitutionalist Army under Carranza.
edges.evidence_quote: Formalmente el primer jefe del Ejército Constitucionalista, Venustiano Carranza dispuso que la División del Norte estaría bajo las órdenes del Cuerpo de Ejército del Noroeste

descriptions: Iron Bloods 58 is a Bandidos support club.
edges.evidence_quote: Five members of the Hagen Bandidos chapter as well as the president of the Iron Bloods 58, a Bandidos support club, were charged in August 2019 with committing violent crimes during a conflict with the rival Freeway Riders Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: The Rosenzweig Gang and Paul Gang were in a violent conflict over control of labor slugging.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosenzweig's dominance was challenged in 1913, when Philip "Pinchey" Paul began a war with Rosenzweig, lasting over several months.

descriptions: Al Menbar is a Bahraini political party associated with the Muslim Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Following parliamentary elections in 2002, Al Menbar became the largest joint party with eight seats in the forty-seat Chamber of Deputies.

descriptions: GMCIR is listed as an opponent of PMF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... GMCIR

descriptions: GMCIR is listed as a non-state opponent of PMF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents Israel, United States, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Iraq (sometimes), Non-state opponents Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant, GMCIR, Army of the Men of the Naqshbandi Order, Al-Nusra Front, Free Syrian Army, Islamic Front, White Flags, Ansar al-Islam, People's Mujahedin of Iran

descriptions: GMCIR is listed as an opponent of PMF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... GMCIR

Evil Corp.description: Russian hacking group active since 2009, responsible for the Dridex banking trojan. Operates with a hierarchical structure similar to organized crime, led by Maksim Yakubets. Specializes in stealing banking credentials and cryptocurrency wallets through phishing campaigns. The group has been linked to significant financial theft in the UK and US.

descriptions: The leader of Evil Corp was a personal friend of the leader of Jabber Zeus.
edges.evidence_quote: Yakubets was a personal friend of core member or leader of the Jabber Zeus hacking group Vyacheslav Penchukov

descriptions: Evil Corp affiliated with LockBit as a ransomware group.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2022 and 2024, Evil Corp diversified its tactics and began affiliating with other ransomware groups, including LockBit.

descriptions: Necurs is listed as an author of Dridex alongside Yakubets, implying a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Authors: Necurs , Maksim Yakubets

descriptions: Evil Corp may be using Raspberry Robin's infrastructure for attacks.
edges.evidence_quote: IBM suggested that Evil Corp may be using Raspberry Robin infrastructure to carry out attacks.

descriptions: Mandiant linked Evil Corp to threat actor UNC2165.
edges.evidence_quote: Mandiant also linked the group to threat actor UNC2165.

La Empresa.description: Colombian drug trafficking cartel based in Medellín, founded in the late 1990s by Gerardo Santana Garza and Luis Mendez. It is a breakaway group from the Juárez Cartel and traffics cocaine, heroin, MDMA, fentanyl, marijuana, and pink cocaine. The cartel operates in Colombia, Mexico, and other regions, and remains active.

descriptions: La Empresa is a hybrid organization derived from Barrio Azteca.
edges.evidence_quote: Mendez, who was the El Paso FBI office's most wanted fugitive and the last person sought for the attacks, also made La Empresa a hybrid of Barrio Azteca.

descriptions: La Empresa is described as a criminal cell associated with Los Aztecas (Barrio Azteca).
edges.evidence_quote: En noviembre de 2019 fueron detenidos tres integrantes de La Empresa (una célula delictiva asociada con Los Aztecas).

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an opponent of the AGC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ELN, FARC dissidents, La Oficina, La Empresa, Alianza Fronteriza

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an opponent of the Clan del Golfo in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ELN , FARC dissidents , La Oficina , La Empresa , Alianza Fronteriza

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an ally of FARC dissidents in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Empresa

descriptions: Barrio Azteca is listed as an ally of La Empresa in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Juárez Cartel , La Linea , Barrio Azteca

descriptions: Juárez Cartel members became adversaries of La Empresa, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: many of the Juárez Cartel members became adversaries of the cartel

descriptions: La Empresa is a breakaway cartel from Juárez Cartel, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel is alleged to be a "breakaway" cartel of the Juárez Cartel

descriptions: La Linea is listed as an ally of La Empresa in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Juárez Cartel , La Linea , Barrio Azteca

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel is listed as a rival of La Empresa in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: La Empresa was part of the Golden Triangle Alliance, a cooperative alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: La Empresa formed during this time and was one of the gangs.

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an ally of La Línea in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... La Empresa

descriptions: Infobox lista a La Empresa como aliado de La Línea.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... La Empresa

descriptions: Los Mexicles lists La Nueva Empresa as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... La Nueva Empresa

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is allied with La Empresa.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... La Empresa

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists La Empresa as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (via the Cartel of the Suns, alleged by the US government), Primeiro Comando da Capital, Comando Vermelho, La Empresa, La Linea, La Unión Tepito, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones (from November 2023), Los Lobos

descriptions: ANM collaborated with PLA to create Heroes of Return.
edges.evidence_quote: In collaboration with the Palestine Liberation Organisation's (PLO) Palestinian Liberation Army (PLA), the ANM established the Abtal al-Audah (Heroes of Return) commando group in early summer 1966.

descriptions: PLA collaborated with ANM to establish Heroes of Return.
edges.evidence_quote: In collaboration with the Palestine Liberation Organisation's (PLO) Palestinian Liberation Army (PLA), the ANM established the Abtal al-Audah (Heroes of Return) commando group in early summer 1966.

descriptions: Bandidos clashed with Broncos, a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: On 11 May 2019, Bandidos members clashed with members of the Zürich Hells Angels chapter and the Broncos – a Hells Angels support club from Bern – in Belp.

descriptions: Kurdish mafia cooperated with Iranian criminals (Iranian mafia) in migrant smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: they cooperated with Iranian criminals to facilitate the migrant smuggling.

descriptions: Gallico and Parrello-Condello were in a feud starting in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello

descriptions: Santebal was the security apparatus of the Khmer Rouge.
edges.evidence_quote: Acting through the Santebal, the Khmer Rouge arrested, tortured and eventually executed anyone who was suspected of belonging to several categories of supposed enemies

descriptions: East Side Longos harassed Cambodian refugees who later founded Asian Boyz, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The founders of Long Beach Asian Boyz were originally Cambodian refugees who the East Side Longos were harassing during the 1980s.

descriptions: East Side Longos is listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: East Side Longos

descriptions: Big Circle Gang has a rivalry with East Side Longos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: East Side Longos

descriptions: TRG had a violent rivalry with East Side Longo.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Tiny Rascals Gang had a violent rivalry with the Long Beach-based East Side Longos, who were predominantly Hispanic, during the early 1990s.

descriptions: Mexican Mafia ordered East Side Longo to receive support from West Side Longo against TRG.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican Mafia ordered the West Side Longo gang to put aside its rivalry with the East Side Longo and support their former rivals against the TRG.

descriptions: West Side Longo and East Side Longo were rivals but cooperated against TRG under Mexican Mafia order.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican Mafia ordered the West Side Longo gang to put aside its rivalry with the East Side Longo and support their former rivals against the TRG.

Polverino clan.description: The Polverino clan is a Neapolitan Camorra clan based in Marano di Napoli, Italy, founded by Giuseppe Polverino in the 1990s. It became independent from the Nuvoletta clan and grew to dominate hashish trafficking from Morocco to Italy via Spain, supplying other mafia organizations. The clan has a strong presence in Spain and is considered one of the most powerful Camorra groups there. Giuseppe Polverino was arrested in 2012, but the clan remains active.

descriptions: The Polverino clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Polverino clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Infobox lists Polverino clan as an ally of Licciardi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Contini clan, Mallardo clan, Nuvoletta clan, Polverino clan, Moccia clan, Giuliano clan, Catania Mafia family, 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Polverino clan is an ally of the Mallardo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Polverino clan

descriptions: The Polverino clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan after its decline.
edges.evidence_quote: the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans

descriptions: The Polverino clan replaced the Nuvoletta clan in the territory and has strong family ties with them.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan è stato sostituito sul territorio dai Polverino e Orlando , entrambi con forti legami di parentela con i Nuvoletta.

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta , the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta , the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita

descriptions: The Lubrano-Ligato clan is listed as an ally of the Polverino clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan , Orlando clan , Mallardo clan , Lubrano-Ligato clan , Licciardi clan , Cosa Nostra

descriptions: The Licciardi clan is listed as an ally of the Polverino clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan , Orlando clan , Mallardo clan , Lubrano-Ligato clan , Licciardi clan , Cosa Nostra

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan , Orlando clan , Mallardo clan , Lubrano-Ligato clan , Licciardi clan , Cosa Nostra

descriptions: The Polverino clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the investigations, the Polverinos are considered the successors of the Nuvoletta clan.

descriptions: The Polverino clan originated as a branch of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan started as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: The Orlando clan is listed as an ally of the Polverino clan in the infobox.

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta , the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta , the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta , the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: Polverino clan has good relationship with Cosa Nostra families from Palermo.
edges.evidence_quote: the Polverino clan has a good relationship with the Cosa Nostra families from Palermo, in particular thanks to the drug trafficking business.

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta , the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita

descriptions: The Polverino clan has a good relationship with Cosa Nostra families from Palermo.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan is known to have a good relationship with the Cosa Nostra families from Palermo .

descriptions: Club Deroes, Coffin Cheaters, Gypsy Jokers, and Gods Garbage cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth in 1989.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Coffin Cheaters, Club Deroes, Gypsy Jokers, and Gods Garbage cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth in 1989.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Gods Garbage and three other clubs cooperated to violently eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Gypsy Jokers, Coffin Cheaters, Club Deroes, and Gods Garbage cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth in 1989.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was rivals with the Williams Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Syndicate, Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (until the early 90s)

Georgian mafia.description: The Georgian mafia is an organized crime network originating in Georgia, active across Europe and post-Soviet states. It has produced the largest number of 'thieves in law' in former USSR countries and controls many Russian-speaking mafia groups. The network is divided into two major clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi, with the Kutaisi clan being particularly influential. Its criminal activities include arms trafficking, murder, money laundering, and human trafficking.

descriptions: Armenian gangsters and Georgian mafiosi were part of the same criminal syndicate in France and Belgium in 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 2018, the French police conducted an operation codenamed VORS 69-01 against a criminal syndicate operating in France and Belgium , which included Azerbaijani mafiosi , Georgian mafiosi and Armenian gangsters.

descriptions: Kutaisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.

descriptions: Georgian mafia parallels Sicilian Mafia in rules.
edges.evidence_quote: In many of its rules or 'laws', the Georgian mafia parallels the Sicilian Mafia.

descriptions: Tbilisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.

descriptions: The Georgian mafia is listed as an ally of the Greek mafia in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Albanian mafia , American Mafia , Armenian mafia , Georgian mafia , Kurdish mafia , Baybaşin family , Serbian mafia , Sacra Corona Unita , Philadelphia Greek Mob , Velentzas crime family

descriptions: Mkhedrioni was led by a former thief-in-law, indicating ties to the Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mkhedrioni led by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani

descriptions: Nyatura was an allied militia that executed coordinated attacks with M23.
edges.evidence_quote: the M23 relied on allied militias, including Nyatura
